M

MW_Authenticate(String, String, char[]) - Static method in class emiratesid.ae.UAEIDCardLibJavaWrapper
Sign the data with the Authentication KeyPair, the pin is not cached
MW_AuthenticateCSP(long, char[]) - Static method in class emiratesid.ae.UAEIDCardLibJavaWrapper
Sign the data with the CSP using the Authentication Keypair, this function will prompt for the PIN just for the first time, once provided the PIN will be cached
MW_CaptureAndConvert(int, FTP_Template) - Static method in class emiratesid.ae.UAEIDCardLibJavaWrapper
SAGEM Capture and Convert function, that captures the fingerprint and convert it to the specified template format
MW_CaptureImage(int, int) - Static method in class emiratesid.ae.UAEIDCardLibJavaWrapper
SAGEM capture function, to capture a fingerprint image

Closes an established context, and releases all related resources

Establish a connection with the specified PCSC card reader

Convert fingerprint image into a template

Disconnect a specific card connection and releases all resources

Returns the last error occured on the kernel
MW_GetMaxFailedMatch(long) - Static method in class emiratesid.ae.UAEIDCardLibJavaWrapper
Retrieves the Maximum number of Failed Match left on the MOC applet

Retrieves the Algorithm version used on the MOC applet

Reads the current MatchOnCard Applet Serial Number

Calls the MW_Init native function to initialize the secure messaging module
